PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?representative ?name WHERE {
  ?representative p:P39 / ps:P39 wd:Q15522368 ; p:P39 / pq:P768 wd:Q8991139 .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?representative p:P39 / pq:P582 ?endTime

  ?representative rdfs:label ?name .
  FILTER(lang(?name) = 'en')
}
LIMIT 1
